message:
🐛 Harden Netlify functions: fix origin bypass, validate sessionId, restrict CORS (#2452)

- analytics-collect.mts: Reject requests with no Origin/Referer instead
  of allowing them. Replace wildcard CORS with dynamic origin checking.
- presence.mts: Add sessionId format validation (alphanumeric, max 64
  chars) to prevent storage abuse. Replace wildcard CORS with allowlist.

Security: M8 (origin bypass), M9 (sessionId validation), M11 (CORS).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
